docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DANIEL PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TEGSCO LLC IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
